Ground Truth:
sin(x) + cos(y) + z = 1

Component functions:
  g1(x) = sin(x)
  g2(y) = cos(y)
  g3(z) = z


Fitted Equation:
0.942625068102736 - 0.298354184442233*x + 0.293017334300093*z - 0.291153427220793 + (-0.5200594/((0.996437068794596*c + 0.0129285616415275)**2)**0.018980624) = -0.5330
R²_ortho = 0.4942

Component functions:
  g1(x) = 0.942625068102736 - 0.298354184442233*x
  g2(z) = 0.293017334300093*z - 0.291153427220793
  g3(c) = -0.5200594/((0.996437068794596*c + 0.0129285616415275)**2)**0.018980624
